nasb.text: You shall remember that you were a slave in Egypt, and you shall be careful to observe these statutes.

esv.text: You shall remember that you were a slave in Egypt; and you shall be careful to observe these statutes.

cnv.text: 你也要記得你在埃及作過奴僕；你要謹守遵行這些律例。

ccb.text: 你们要记住自己曾在埃及做过奴隶，因此要谨遵这些律例。
